---
title: "Chris North: Coming home to myself"
description: "Wellcome Trust has published some wonderful graphic stories by Chris North about his life as an intersex man"
date: 2026-06-18
categories: [intersex]
---


For Chris North, being born intersex in the 1940s (or a “true hermaphrodite” in the language of the time) meant decades of hospital visits, tests, operations and secrecy... [read on](https://wellcomecollection.org/series/coming-home-to-myself)
